cmd.link.description: Link your Discord account to your Oscarr account.
cmd.search.description: Search for a movie or TV show and submit a request.
cmd.status.description: See your pending Oscarr requests and download progress.
cmd.help.description: Show the list of Leonarr commands.
link.prompt: Click the link below to connect your Discord account to Oscarr. The link is personal and expires in 10 minutes.
link.already: Your Discord account is already linked to Oscarr ({{name}}).
link.misconfigured: Leonarr can't build the link yet — the admin needs to set the public site URL in Oscarr's general settings.
not_linked: Your Discord account isn't linked yet. Run /link first.
search.submit.title: Submit this request?
search.submit.title.requested: You already have an active request for this.
request.created.pending: Requested **{{title}}** — your admin will review it.
request.created.approved: Requested **{{title}}** — auto-approved, sending to the service now.
request.created.send_failed: Requested **{{title}}** — the request was saved but Oscarr couldn't reach the *arr service. An admin will retry.
request.error.duplicate: You already have an active request for **{{title}}**.
request.error.blacklisted: **{{title}}** has been blocked by an administrator.
request.error.invalid: Something is wrong with that request: {{reason}}
request.error.quality: You don't have access to the selected quality profile.
request.error.generic: Something went wrong ({{code}}). Try again in a minute.
status.empty: You don't have any Oscarr requests yet.
status.heading: Your latest requests
help.title: Leonarr commands
help.footer: Oscarr is watching. Also, please be patient with the robot.
